description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can with a slightly tapered top and bottom, featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in white script on a deep red background. The can has a standard pull-tab opening on the top, which is metallic silver and slightly recessed. The surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the printed graphics include a large Coca-Cola logo, a white silhouette of a glass bottle, and various product details such as volume (200 ml) and recycling information. The can's body is smooth and hard, with no visible dents or scratches, and the label wraps seamlessly around the entire circumference. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and instantly recognizable as a soft drink container commonly found in urban environments.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, a metallic pull-tab top, and smooth cylindrical shape. The surface is clean and features detailed product information and a bottle silhouette.
description_view_0: The back side of the can shows the Coca-Cola logo, a white bottle silhouette, and detailed product information including volume and recycling symbols.
description_view_1: The front prominently displays the large Coca-Cola script logo in white on a red background, with part of the bottle silhouette visible on the side.
description_view_2: This view shows the Coca-Cola logo wrapping around the can, with additional product details and barcode visible on the side.
description_view_3: The side view highlights the white bottle silhouette and the edge of the Coca-Cola script, with minimal text visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Coca-Cola logo in white script, white bottle silhouette, product details including '200 ml', recycling symbols, and barcode, all on a red background.
